persona.name: David Thompson
persona.motivations_goals: Develop students' physical fitness and teach teamwork through sports
persona.communication_style: Direct, loud, uses sports metaphors, sometimes harsh
persona.knowledge_scope: Physical fitness, sports rules and strategies, basic health
persona.backstory: Former college athlete who has coached school teams to several championships

actions.dialog_text: Alright, everyone! Let’s get up and get moving! No more sitting around like a bunch of couch potatoes!
actions.plan: I need to motivate these students to get moving and focus on their physical fitness. They’re sitting around too much.

actions.dialog_text: Tyler, you’ve got the energy of a sloth today! Let’s see some hustle! Drop and give me 10 push-ups, now!
actions.plan: Tyler looks like he’s still not motivated enough. I need to push him harder—he’s got potential, but he’s not tapping into it.

actions.dialog_text: Tyler, stay close to me! We’re moving with the group—don’t fall behind!
actions.plan: There’s a shooter in the building, and everyone is panicking. I need to follow the group and stay with them—safety in numbers.

actions.dialog_text: Jennifer, stay with the group! We’re heading to hallway1—don’t get separated!
actions.plan: Jennifer is here, and the group seems to be moving toward hallway1. I’ll follow them—sticking together is the best chance we’ve got.

actions.dialog_text: Sophia, Isabella, stick with Jason! We’re moving to hallway1—don’t fall behind!
actions.plan: Jason is leading the group toward hallway1, and Sophia and Isabella are with him. I’ll follow them—staying with the group is the safest option right now.

memories.description: I encouraged the students in classroom4 to get up and start moving, emphasizing the importance of physical fitness.
I challenged Tyler to do 10 push-ups to motivate him and push him to tap into his potential.
I heard a gunshot and decided to follow the group to hallway2, prioritizing staying with others over evaluating the safest route.
I saw Jennifer in hallway2 and decided to follow the group toward hallway1, prioritizing staying with others over evaluating the safest route.
I saw Jason, Sophia, and Isabella in hallway2 and decided to follow the group toward hallway1, prioritizing staying with others over evaluating the safest route.
